summary: Critical issues: (1) Workflow references fixture files (fixtures/basic.json, etc.) that don't exist—will fail immediately. (2) No test files provided despite explicit TDD requirement ('write a failing test FIRST'). (3) Test harness missing—task mandates running `act push --rm` for each test case and saving output to `act-result.txt`, but no such script exists. (4) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA (security issue, best practice violation). (5) Bun installed via `curl | bash` (reproducibility risk). (6) applyIncludes logic (lines 65-85) is complex, lacks explanatory comments. Core generator logic is sound, types clean, validation comprehensive, but deliverable is incomplete and unrunnable.
